description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a dark brown finish, featuring three integrated drawers on the left side and a flat, spacious work surface. The desk is paired with a modern office chair that has a teal cushioned seat and backrest, supported by a light gray metal frame and five-wheeled base. The right side of the desk is supported by two cylindrical metal legs, providing stability and a contemporary look. The drawers have recessed handles, making them easy to open while maintaining a sleek appearance. The overall design is functional and suitable for office or study environments, with ample legroom beneath the desk. The materials and construction suggest durability and everyday usability.
description: A dark brown wooden desk with three left-side drawers and a flat work surface, paired with a teal cushioned office chair on wheels. The desk features metal legs on the right and recessed drawer handles for a modern, functional look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three left-side drawers, flat work surface, and the teal office chair positioned behind the desk.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the desk, the thickness of the work surface, and the chair's profile with its five-wheeled base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open leg space beneath the desk, the back of the chair, and the right-side metal legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the solid desk panel on the left, the flat work surface, and the chair's side profile.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the three drawers and open leg space, intended for the user to sit at the chair and access the drawers easily. The back is flat and featureless, while the sides are defined by the drawers and metal legs.
